headline: This Is Why Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) is one of Louis Navellier’s Top Long-Term Stock Picks
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) is one of Louis Navellier’s top long-term stock picks. On May 1, Stifel analyst Brian Brophy touted Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) first-quarter 2026 results, which came in above expectations. Consequently, he raised the stock’s price target to $784 from $654 while reiterating a Buy rating.
